kpis.label: Average number of candidates / senior search

universe.label: Most Relevant Firms
universe.sub: Credit Hedge Funds, Alternative Credit Platforms & Diversified Alternatives Managers

timeline.name: Intake
milestones: Search Kickoff: Define key considerations and unique value proposition. Outline search strategy and establish weekly meeting cadence.

timeline.name: Sourcing
milestones: Prospect Outreach: Begin outreach and assessment across varied target pools.
Archetypal Profile Discussion: Review prospect profiles to refine experience criteria and analytical skills benchmarks.

timeline.name: Candidate Introductions
milestones: Candidate Introductions & Assessments: Commence introductions and begin interviews with relevant stakeholders.
Weekly Update Calls: Review feedback, iterate on candidate discussions, and continue to test hypotheses.

timeline.name: Finalist Candidates
timeline.bar_text: Finalists complete a 360-day strategic business plan
milestones: Select Finalist Candidates: Rank order candidates based on assessment matrix.
Case Study: Finalists present a 90/180/270/360-day business plan — the most illuminating part of our process.

timeline.name: Offer Process
milestones: Frame Offer: Extend offer to finalist candidate.
References & Background Check: Complete thorough reference calls and background verification before start date.
